name: Walleye Pike Sandwiches with Cambridge Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 can rinsed and chopped anchovy fillets
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the fish fillets in the egg and buttermilk mixture.
2. In a small bowl, combine the egg, anchovy fillets, capers, chopped herbs, Dijon mustard, vinegar, cayenne, and salt and pepper. Stir and mash together thoroughly.
3. Gradually add the oil and incorporate completely until you have a mayonnaise-type consistency.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a deep sauté pan to no more than 1/3 up the side of the pan. Ensure the oil reaches 350 degrees using a deep fat fry thermometer.
5. In a shallow bowl, combine the flour and cornmeal, and season with Creole spice.
6. Coat the fish fillets evenly with the flour mixture.
7. Carefully drop the coated fish fillets into the hot oil and fry until golden, about 8 minutes.
8. Spread bread slices with a generous coating of Cambridge sauce.
9. Remove the fried fish from the pan and drain on paper towels.
10. Place each piece of fish on a slice of bread and top with another slice.
11. Garnish with pickles.
Yield: 2 servings
